How It Works

Easy. Simple. Quick.

Getting started is as simple as 1, 2, 3!

🏢

For Businesses

1
Sign Up as a Business

Create your company profile in minutes — it's free to get started.

2
Get Personalised Assistance

Our dedicated executive will contact you to understand your specific requirements.

3
Post Jobs & Start Hiring

Browse pre-verified talent and hire the right offline worker within 24–48 hours.

Sign Up as Business
🎓

For Students & Job Seekers

1
Sign Up as a Job Seeker

Create your free profile and showcase your skills, experience, and availability.

2
Get Personalised Assistance

Our executive connects you with the right opportunities matching your skills.

3
Explore Day Jobs & Start Earning

Discover local day jobs near you, apply instantly, and start working and earning!

Sign Up as Job Seeker
Safety & Security

Trust. Reliability. Protection.

Your data and payments are fully secured on the Freelanzo platform.

🔒

All transactions are encrypted and protected with bank-grade security.

💳

✅

🛡️

We never disclose your account information to any third-party service.
